text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ooooof! That should do it for today's<n>training,
right?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I think we made good prog—huh? Is<n>that?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, don't tell me you're going to<n>follow me the
whole way around the<n>perimeter.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But of course! As if I could overlook<n>the hard work
of a rival such as you!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Nay, I'll wring every last drop of<n>energy from my
body to keep up with<n>you! Ohhh, what a stirring
scene!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What scene? What are you talking<n>about?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! Yes, we're off to a<n>great start!
Now, it's time that I<n>overtake you in a blaze of
glory!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohghasfkh! What on earth was that?!<n>One-sided
rivalry?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: It's clear as day. We've got a classiccase of "I can't stand to be with her,but I can't stand to be without her."☆

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Welp! There's nothing for me to do<n>now but run
after them... Not too close,<n>but not too far...
choice_data_list: So long as you stay out of sight, okay?
No, you'll wind up overworking yourself.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Not drawing attention to<n>yourself is rule
number one of oshi<n>watching!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
When it comes to sneaking around<n>undetected
and watching my oshis,<n>not even a ninja can best
me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'm off for another run!Zooom!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Before long, Agnes Digital comes<n>back in a tizzy.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... Yeah, you're right, I<n>shouldn't run
anymore today...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But if I follow them, we don't have to<n>call it
training. It's more like<n>recreation. That's it! It's
not exercise,<n>it's just simping!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital tries to reason her way<n>into getting
my permission, but,<n>unwilling to let her overwork
herself, I<n>send her home.
